generated_oml:
instance SafetyMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight for assessing safety status of the thermal incubator system"
]

instance PerformanceOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight for optimizing system performance based on sensor data and models"
]

instance PredictiveInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Forecasted behavior of the physical twin under current conditions"
]

instance FaultDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detection of faults in the thermal incubator system"
]

instance StateEstimationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Estimated state of the physical twin using sensor data"
]

instance OptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimized system parameters for enhanced performance"
]

instance ControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated adjustment of physical twin components upon violation detection"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring service for safety and performance assessment of the thermal incubator system"
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyMonitoringInsight, PerformanceOptimizationInsight, FaultDetectionInsight, StateEstimationInsight
]

instance PredictiveSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive simulation service for forecasting physical twin behavior under current conditions"
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictiveInsight
]

instance OptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimization algorithms for system-wide enhancements"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimizationInsight
]

instance ControlMechanismService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Control mechanisms for adjusting physical twin upon violation detection"
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlAction
]

instance ScipyPackage : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python Scipy package for optimization and calibration algorithms"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimizationService, PredictiveSimulationService
]

instance RabbitMQServer : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ server facilitating communication between physical sensors and virtual twin"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance RaspberryPiController : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B acting as the controller for the thermal incubator system"
    DTDFVocab:enables ControlMechanismService
]

instance GeometricModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "CAD model representing structural properties of the thermal incubator system"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyPackage
]

instance AnalyticalModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Differential equations model for thermal dynamics of the incubator"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyPackage
]

instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Temperature sensor monitoring the thermal incubator system"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor
    base:desc "Temperature data transmitted via RabbitMQ communication protocol"
]

instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature measurements from incubator sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyPackage, RaspberryPiController
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Commands for controlling the fan and heatbed are sent via RabbitMQ to the Raspberry Pi controller. The low-level driver implements a safe protocol for command execution. Specific command types, message formats, validation, authentication, feedback systems, conflict resolution, and confirmation mechanisms are not detailed."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system integrates calibration algorithms for model parameter estimation using sensor data, monitoring systems to assess safety and operational optimality, and decision-making processes (human or algorithmic) to adjust the physical twin, forming a cohesive framework that synchronizes data, models, and algorithms for enhanced physical twin operation."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Calibration algorithms update models with best parameter estimates from sensor data; monitors validate system performance against safety and optimization criteria to maintain model fidelity."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ is used for synchronization and communication, with a 1-Wire bus for sensor connectivity. Network topology, bandwidth, latency requirements, reliability, redundancy, and security protocols are not specified."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ server and controller hardware (Raspberry Pi 4 Model B) are deployed on-premise. RabbitMQ supports deployment on-premise and in the cloud, but computational and storage requirements, scalability mechanisms, and availability/reliability assurances are not provided."
]
